data.title: BNB Surpasses 590 USDT with a Narrowed 0.60% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Apr 14, 2025, 02:34 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 590 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 590.789978 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 0.60% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: U.S. eases tech tariffs, offering relief to Apple and semiconductor sector
data.description:
14-4-2025 – Washington has unveiled revised tariff guidelines, offering respite to the technology sector amidst widespread economic uncertainty. The modifications, announced on Friday, carve out crucial exemptions for an array of electronic devices, encompassing everything from mobile phones to semiconductor manufacturing equipment. The move marks a significant departure from the previously announced blanket tariffs that [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/u-s-eases-tech-tariffs-offering-relief-to-apple-and-semiconductor-sector/

data.title: Zoth attacker transfers 400 ETH to new address
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Paidun monitoring, the address marked as the Zoth attacker has transferred 400 ETH (about 650,000 US dollars) to a new address.

data.title: OM Whale transferred more than $90 million to OKX three days ago, and now has a floating loss of more than $400 million
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Spot On Chain monitoring, three days before this round of plunge, the newly-minted OM whales transferred a total of 14.27 million OM (about 91 million US dollars) to OKX, with an average price of 6.375 US dollars.
At the end of March this year, this group of addresses bought 84.15 million OM from Binance, costing about 565 million US dollars (average price of about 6.711 US dollars). After OM plunged nearly 90%, its remaining holdings were only worth about 62.2 million US dollars, with a floating loss of up to 406 million US dollars.
Spot On Chain pointed out that it is not ruled out that this group of addresses has hedged in other channels, and even the driving force behind this round of plunge.

data.title: Trump and Powell's Growing Conflict to Dominate Market Focus
data.description: According to Odaily, BCA Research's Chief Global Strategist Peter Berezi has indicated that the primary market focus in the coming weeks will shift from tariffs to the escalating conflict between U.S. President Donald Trump and Federal Reserve Chairman Jerome Powell. Berezi anticipates that the Federal Reserve will resist calls to purchase bonds, as such actions could encourage poor economic policies and undermine the Fed's independence.

data.title: Trump: Semiconductor tariff rates to be announced in the coming week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump: The tariff rate for semiconductors will be announced in the next week. For some companies, there will be flexibility in semiconductor tariffs, but it is not yet clear. (Jinshi)

data.title: Executive Director of the Ethereum Foundation: L1 minting assets, winning the RWA and stablecoin markets are secondary goals of Ethereum development
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Tomasz K. Stańczak, executive director of the Ethereum Foundation, said that the core of Ethereum development is based on existing culture and values, and secondary goals include always minting assets in L1, winning the RWA and stablecoin markets, improving security and communication clarity, and goal-driven research and development within the foundation.
Expanding blobs, L1, and improving user experience are the main roadmaps of Ethereum. In addition, Ethereum's long-term vision includes building AI agent protocols, adding autonomous machines, open source society, and attracting future thinkers.

data.title: The author of "Rich Dad Poor Dad": The great collapse has come, Bitcoin, gold and silver may give birth to the winners of the new world
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Robert Kiyosaki, author of Rich Dad Poor Dad, posted on the X platform that the biggest crash in history has already arrived. The current gold price has hit a record high, silver demand has skyrocketed, and Bitcoin continues to soar. If investors remain indifferent, they will face the risk of having their wealth robbed.
In addition, he emphasized that traditional investors who cling to stocks, bonds, ETFs and mutual funds will become victims of this financial storm. Those who choose gold, silver and Bitcoin may become the rich and leaders of the new world.

data.title: OM plunged 90% today, but its performance this year is still better than ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market data, although Mantra (OM) fell by more than 90% today, its performance this year is still better than Ethereum (ETH). OM fell 26.59% in a year, and ETH fell 59.30% in a year.

data.title: Shaw: Launchpad platform auto.fun may be launched this week
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: ai16z founder Shaw Yu X said in a post: Launchpad platform auto.fun may be launched this week. Creators can collect the fees generated by content creation and token issuance on their own, and the community can collaborate to initiate content or create CTO tokens based on other platforms. The platform emphasizes "anti-hype" and "pure fun" and aims to create a decentralized, transparent content and token release space that truly belongs to creators and the community.
